title: Debug dungeon building not showing in commons

log.context: Debug dungeon building not showing in commons

Fixed and posted. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** The dungeon entrance building was added to `/mnt/data/commons-client/src/map/renderer.ts` (the TypeScript commons-client source), but `clung.us/grazing` serves `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html` — a completely self-contained monolithic HTML/JS file that doesn't use the commons-client bundle at all. These are two separate implementations of the same game.

The map tile data in `grazing.html` already had building tiles at rows 2-6, cols 40-4...(truncated)
